## Validation

- [ ] I recorded the exact toolchain and configuration.
- [ ] I ran relevant formatting, schema, build, and static checks.
- [ ] I tested on named hardware, or clearly marked this compile/research-only.
- [ ] I attached a redacted log and reproducible test protocol.
- [ ] I checked already-working subsystems for regressions.

Commands/results:

## Safety and data handling

- [ ] The change does not write preloader, NVRAM, GPT, modem/secure firmware, or a known-good recovery slot.
- [ ] Destructive behavior is explicit, narrowly targeted, and documented.
- [ ] No firmware, partition dump, secret, personal identifier, or unredacted device log is included.
- [ ] Third-party material has compatible licensing and documented provenance.
